ref: While Jacob was still talking with the men, his cousin Rachel came up with her father's sheep.

translated: Jacob went to the market, and Rachel also went there. They are together now.

text: Le Uwumbɔr aah nan bui mi ke m nya nte do ki buen kitiyayaŋ ni na, le m bui mpuu ke, ti yaa ti fuu nimɔk na kan, u bui ke uninja le ye mi, kina le u ga mɔk mi waah gee mi pu na.”
translated: If Uwumbɔr says that I cannot do it, I will go and do it; if you say I cannot, I will prove you wrong and do it.

ref: You surely wouldn't let them be killed when you destroy the evil ones. You are the judge of all the earth, and you do what is right.”
text: Mbamɔn, saan kpaan ki ku bininyaam ni titunwanbirdam kina. Sin Uwumbɔr aa kee ŋa kina, kaan kii ŋa kina mu. Aa yaa ŋa kina kan, bininyaam mu ga ji falaa titunwanbirdam chee. Saan kii ki ŋa kina. Sin Uwumbɔr u ye dulnyaa wee mɔmɔk aabɔjir na ga sil ŋa tiwan mɔmɔk ibamɔn ponn ni.”
